overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district at dusk. The player descends from an elevated wooden walkway through neon-lit corridors and bustling plazas filled with NPCs, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon signage

events.description: beginning descent down wooden stairs from upper platform
navigating around pedestrians while continuing downward

agents.ego_description: walking down wooden stairs and ramps in a futuristic shopping district, passing food vendors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking up the stairs toward camera

entered.detail: large yellow pipeline structure running between skyscrapers overhead
pink and purple illuminated advertisement sign on building facade
elevated wooden plank walkway with integrated lighting strips
small food kiosk with illuminated menu displays and blue awning

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated wooden walkway in a dense cyberpunk city district. The player descends stairs surrounded by towering buildings with neon advertisements, passing a food vendor stall on the right while navigating around other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending concrete ramp with advertising walls

events.description: transitioning from wooden deck to concrete ramp between tall walls
entering darker shaded corridor with artificial wall lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing down a steep concrete ramp flanked by large digital billboards and concrete walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking down the ramp alongside the player

entered.detail: steep concrete ramp with textured surface leading downward
large illuminated advertisement showing cybernetic hand with text NEW JOB? GET AN UPGRADE!
tall dark concrete wall forming the side of the ramp structure

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the wooden walkway onto a steep concrete ramp between tall walls. Large digital billboards illuminate the shaded corridor, including a prominent cybernetic enhancement advertisement, as the descent continues toward the lower city level.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined pedestrian corridor opening to plaza

events.description: exiting narrow ramp into open area with palm trees and wider plaza
crowd density increases significantly entering the main commercial plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through a corridor lined with palm trees toward a busy commercial plaza with large digital screens

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking and conversing near the plaza entrance

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the walkway creating a tropical urban atmosphere
food kiosk with bright purple neon lighting and signage
massive curved digital billboard displaying WIDE OPEN advertisement in pink and purple

segments.scene_description: Exiting the enclosed ramp, the scene opens into a palm-lined corridor leading to a bustling plaza. The environment brightens with natural dusk light mixed with massive digital screens, including a prominent curved display showing the WIDE OPEN advertisement, while pedestrian activity increases significantly.

scene_state.functional_zone: central commercial plaza with multiple digital screens

events.description: turning slightly right while navigating through crowd toward tunnel entrance
approaching dark tunnel underpass at the end of the plaza

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza toward a tunnel entrance, passing various pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near information kiosk looking at phone
group sitting on benches near palm trees

entered.detail: small yellow and green information booth with WIDENET signage
dark underpass entrance with illuminated signage visible inside
large digital billboard displaying TOUGH MORNING? advertisement with coffee cup graphic

segments.scene_description: The final segment traverses the wide central plaza filled with scattered pedestrians and dominated by massive digital advertisements. The player approaches a dark tunnel underpass, passing a yellow information kiosk and billboards advertising morning beverages, while the ground appears wet reflecting the neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from an elevated urban walkway into a sprawling, neon-drenched downtown plaza at dusk. It begins on a wooden walkway where the camera moves down stairs past a food vendor and pedestrians, flanked by towering buildings and glowing advertisements. As the descent continues, the scene shifts into a steep concrete ramp enclosed by tall walls and illuminated by large digital billboards for cybernetic enhancements. The environment then opens up into a palm-lined corridor that leads into a bright, bustling plaza dominated by a massive curved display for WIDE OPEN. Finally, the camera traverses the wide central square past a yellow information kiosk and beverage billboards, moving across wet ground reflecting the neon lights toward a dark tunnel underpass.
